chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1445 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 6110/023 3.For hearing of main case 24-10-2023 Mr. Qurban Ali Buller, Advocate along with petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G and Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistnat A.G a/w Inspector Faheem Naeem I.O, Inspector Muhammad Bachal Qazi, and SIP Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Khairpur. ***** Statements filed by respondents No.3,4,5&6 are taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. We have heard learned counsel for the petitioner at some length. He submits that the petitioner has been falsely implicated in the case for offence under Section 212 PPC (harbouring offenders), under Crime No. 132 of 2023, registered at P.S, Ranipur on 28.08.2023. His arguments have been rebutted by learned Additional P.G and Assistant A.G, who submit that offence is cognizable and punishable for five years. The investigation is over and has been submitted before the competent authority for a final opinion and in case opinion comes in favour of prosecution, the Challan would be submitted otherwise the case would be disposed of. In view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application(s). However, in case the opinion comes in favour of prosecution and the Challan is submitted in the Court, the petitioner would be at liberty to file application before the trial Court seeking his acquittal on any ground including the ones agitated by him in this petition for his acquittal.

In view of above, this petition is disposed of along with listed application(s). However, in case the opinion comes in favour of prosecution and the Challan is submitted in the Court, the petitioner would be at liberty to file application before the trial Court seeking his acquittal on any ground including the ones agitated by him in this petition for his acquittal. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
